title: Echoes of Adventure: Compass
description: A minimalist yet immersive compass overlay that shows your current direction, angle, coordinates and waypoints.
body:
> *The mod was reworked and had the old name "**Echo Compass HUD**"*

**Echoes of Adventure: Compass** has evolved from a simple directional overlay into a comprehensive navigation suite. Designed to enhance your exploration without breaking immersion, it provides a flexible waypoint system that keeps you oriented across every dimension.

## **While primarily a client-side mod, installing it on a server unlocks advanced features like global markers and team tracking for a coordinated multiplayer experience.**

# ✨ Key Features
### 📍 Versatile Waypoint System
Never lose your way again with multiple waypoint types:
- **Custom Waypoints**: Create personal markers for your base, mines, or points of interest.
- **Death Waypoints**: Automatically marks the spot where you last died.
- **Bed Waypoints**: Your respawn point is automatically tracked and displayed.
- **Global Waypoints (Server-side)**: Server operators can set markers visible to every player.
- **Team Icons (Server-side)**: Keep track of your allies by rendering vanilla team player icons directly on the compass.

# 🐞 Bugs & Suggestions
Found a bug? Something feels off? Or just want to suggest a feature?
Report issues or share ideas on the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fXze8HDK6c) for faster support and communication.
